sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82676" key="*persogenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Περσο-γενής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>< <sense id="n82676.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of Persian origin</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Σελεύκεια</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
